steps.title: Find the two angle measures
steps.content: A transversal through parallel lines creates four angles of one measure and four supplementary angles. If one angle is $(7x-250)^\circ$, the other measure is $$180-(7x-250)=430-7x.$$

steps.title: Compare answer choices to possible sums
steps.content: The other choices appear in the possible-sum list. Choice A, $-14x+1540$, does not; the matching coefficient case gives $-14x+1040$, not $-14x+1540$. A is correct.
